briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting systemic risks in the BaaS model.

- **[Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment](https://www.lesnumeriques.com/banque-en-ligne/adieu-visa-et-mastercard-130-millions-d-europeens-basculent-vers-un-paiement-100-souverain-des-2026-n250918.html)** — *Hacker News* — Over 130 million Europeans are set to transition to a domestically sovereign payment network, reducing reliance on Visa and Mastercard by 2026.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep dive into how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in the payments industry globally.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of open banking startup Credit Kudos signals the tech giant's growing ambitions in financial data and credit services.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Q&A: How open banking could leave small FinTechs out](https://betakit.com/qa-how-open-banking-could-leave-small-fintechs-out/)** — *BetaKit* — An expert Q&A explores how Canada's open banking implementation risks favouring large incumbents while potentially sidelining smaller fintech players.

- **[Canada's early-stage startup funding is in a sustained decline, RBCx finds](https://betakit.com/canadas-early-stage-startup-funding-is-in-a-sustained-decline-rbcx-finds/)** — *BetaKit* — A new RBCx report reveals that early-stage startup funding in Canada has been declining steadily, raising concerns about the pipeline for future fintech and tech innovation.

- **[Blossom Social raises more than $2 million through FrontFundr campaign](https://betakit.com/blossom-social-raises-more-than-2-million-through-frontfundr-campaign/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian investment community platform Blossom Social successfully raised over $2 million through equity crowdfunding platform FrontFundr, demonstrating retail investor appetite for fintech-adjacent startups.

- **[Tetrix raises $15 million USD to excavate investor data buried in old technologies](https://betakit.com/tetrix-raises-15-million-usd-to-excavate-investor-data-buried-in-old-technolgies/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian fintech Tetrix has secured $15 million USD to modernize access to legacy investor data, addressing a critical infrastructure gap in the wealth management sector.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Still relevant context)* Canada's early push to replace screen scraping with secure open banking APIs laid the groundwork for the regulatory framework now taking shape in 2026.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Feds announce $173 million for Women Entrepreneurship Strategy](https://betakit.com/feds-announce-173-million-for-women-entrepreneurship-strategy/)** — *BetaKit* — The federal government's $173 million commitment to women entrepreneurship presents a potential funding opportunity for Atlantic Canadian women-led fintech and tech startups.

- **[Six-month-old Anchorbase closes $2 million USD pre-seed round](https://betakit.com/six-month-old-anchorbase-closes-2-million-usd-pre-seed-round/)** — *BetaKit* — Early-stage Canadian startup Anchorbase closing a $2M pre-seed round is a reminder of the venture capital activity available to nascent fintech ventures, including those emerging from Atlantic Canada.

- **[North American Advisors See Growth Outlook Holding Firm as AI and Generational Change Reshape the Business of Advice](https://financialpost.com/pmn/business-wire-news-releases-pmn/north-american-advisors-see-growth-outlook-holding-firm-as-ai-and-generational-change-reshape-the-business-of-advice-says-natixis-investment-managers-survey)** — *Financial Post* — A Natixis survey finds North American financial advisors expect continued AUM growth driven by AI tools and generational wealth transfer, trends directly relevant to credit unions and wealth management fintechs across Atlantic Canada.
